title: U.S., Iran signal peace progress — but remain at odds over enriched uranium, Strait of Hormuz tolls
summary_full: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio on Thursday said there were "good signs" that an agreement to end the Middle East conflict is in sight.
summary_public: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio on Thursday said there were "good signs" that an agreement to end the Middle East conflict is in sight.

IR.label: mixed
IR.evidence: Iran signal peace progress — but remain at odds over enriched uranium
